_comment: Canary manifest for the IaC coverage guard. Each plant listed here MUST be detected by at least one IaC engine (checkov or trivy-config); internal/coverage asserts it and regenerates the IaC section of docs/coverage.md. IaC engines emit no CWEs, so canaries key on rule IDs: a canary is detected when ANY of its listed rule IDs fires on the file (checkov CKV_* and trivy AVD IDs name the same plant). Rule IDs were confirmed empirically against checkov 3.3.2 and trivy 0.71.2.
